paymentId.description: This is the unique payment id of the supplier payment request

orderId.description: This is the orderId for which supplier payment details are created.

orderName.description: This is the order name associated with order id.

supplierId.description: This is the supplier Id identifying the supplier to whom the payment has to be made.

supplierCompanyName.description: THis is the supplier company name

supplierContact.description: This is the supplier contact number.

paymentSummary.description: This is the payment sumary object under which payment details are provided.

totalAmountToBePaid.description: This is the tomtal amount to be paid for the order id.

advanceAmount.description: This is the advance amount that grocery store gave to supplier during the initial agreement.

isPaymentSuccess.description: This is the indicator set to false when a payment entry is created for a supplier for an order id.

paymentDate.description: THis is the date when payment is done.

schema.description: This is the supplier payment object used to track supplier payment for each order.
schema.title: SupplierPayment
